firstLevel.description: Level of the first block in the cycle

startTime.description: Timestamp of the first block in the cycle

lastLevel.description: Level of the last block in the cycle

endTime.description: Timestamp of the last block in the cycle

snapshotLevel.description: Height of the block where the snapshot was taken

randomSeed.description: Randomly generated seed used by the network for things like baking rights distribution etc.

totalBakers.description: Total number of all active in this cycle bakers

totalBakingPower.description: Total baking power of all active in this cycle bakers

blockReward.description: Fixed reward paid to the block payload proposer in this cycle (micro tez)

blockBonusPerBlock.description: Bonus reward paid to the block producer in this cycle (micro tez)

attestationRewardPerBlock.description: Reward for attestation in this cycle (micro tez)

nonceRevelationReward.description: Reward for seed nonce revelation in this cycle (micro tez)

vdfRevelationReward.description: Reward for vdf revelation in this cycle (micro tez)

dalAttestationRewardPerShard.description: Reward for dal attestation in this cycle (micro tez)

quote.description: Injected historical quote at the end of the cycle
